overview: EXAMY 5 EXAMINATION COUCH, HEIGHT ADJUSTABLE EXAMY 5 is designed to use in physical examination clinics, private clinics, manual therapy centers, ultrasound rooms and hospitals. Two sectional ergonomic design Easy to operate Backrest adjustment with gas spring Motorized backrest adjustment (optional) Electrical height adjustment Hydraulic height adjustment by bilateral foot pedal (optional) Hand remote control Foot control switch (optional) Retractable rolling system fixing floor on 4 rubber caps Epoxy painted steel frame High quality foam with synthetic leather coated Foldable, chrome plated side rails (optional) Breathing space with plug (optional) Paper roll holder (optional) Battery Back-up (optional)
